# RVG Project - Copilot Instructions

## Project Overview
RVG (Retrieval Vector Generation) Project - A Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) based project for advanced document processing and vector-based information retrieval.

## Setup Checklist

- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.
- [ ] Clarify Project Requirements
- [ ] Scaffold the Project
- [ ] Customize the Project
- [ ] Install Required Extensions
- [ ] Compile the Project
- [ ] Create and Run Task
- [ ] Launch the Project
- [ ] Ensure Documentation is Complete
 - [x] Add VS Code workspace settings
 - [x] Add GitHub Actions workflow
